event_integrity_hash.missing_fields: included as JSON null except payload_json, which is {} when absent or non-object
event_integrity_hash.payload_source: payload_json when it is an object, else payload when it is an object, else empty object

batch_hash.input: canonical JSON bytes of the ordered covered_events list after reducing each entry to event_id, event_type, event_hash strings

audit_integrity_digest.covered_event_count_rule: if payload.covered_event_count is present, int(value) must equal len(covered_events)
audit_integrity_digest.covered_events: payload.covered_events must be a list of objects with non-empty event_id, event_type, and event_hash strings
audit_integrity_digest.payload_source: payload_json when object, else payload when object, else empty object
audit_integrity_digest.resource_id_rule: if audit.integrity_digest.resource_id is present and non-empty, it must equal the first 32 hex characters of batch_hash
audit_integrity_digest.target_match_rule: at least one covered_events entry with matching target event_id must have the target event_type and event_hash equal to the recomputed event_integrity_hash
